name: Update-FormatData
-AppendPath
-PSPath
-Path
options.description: Specifies formatting files that this cmdlet adds to the session. The files are loaded after PowerShell loads the built-in formatting files.

options.name: -PrependPath
options.description: Specifies formatting files that this cmdlet adds to the session. The files are loaded before PowerShell loads the built-in formatting files.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

description: Updates the formatting data in the current session.
